reason: CPU utilization is significantly below capacity at both average and peak levels, indicating the instance is larger than the workload requires.
suggested_action: Downsize to a smaller instance type to reduce cost. Review memory needs before resizing.
security_note: HIGH RISK — Internet-facing resource with identity/IAM attached. Combined with detected anomaly (over_provisioned), this resource should be reviewed immediately.

reason: CPU is consistently near or at maximum capacity. This will cause performance degradation, timeouts, or dropped requests under load.
suggested_action: Scale vertically (larger instance) or horizontally (add replicas). Profile the workload to identify hotspots.

reason: Average CPU is low but peak (p95) is very high, indicating a bursty workload pattern. Standard metrics may mask these bursts.
suggested_action: Consider auto-scaling policies or a burstable instance type designed for spiky workloads.
security_note: MEDIUM RISK — Internal resource with identity/IAM attached. Ensure least-privilege policies are enforced.

reason: CPU is consistently near or at maximum capacity. This will cause performance degradation, timeouts, or dropped requests under load. Additionally detected: memory_pressure.
suggested_action: Scale vertically (larger instance) or horizontally (add replicas). Profile the workload to identify hotspots.
security_note: HIGH RISK — Internet-facing resource with identity/IAM attached. Combined with detected anomaly (cpu_saturation, memory_pressure), this resource should be reviewed immediately.

reason: Both CPU and memory usage are critically low, suggesting this resource is either unused or running an empty/stopped workload.
suggested_action: Investigate if this instance is still needed. If not, terminate or hibernate to eliminate waste.
security_note: HIGH RISK — Internet-facing resource with identity/IAM attached. Combined with detected anomaly (idle_resource), this resource should be reviewed immediately.

reason: All metrics are within normal operating ranges. No anomalies detected.
suggested_action: No action required. Continue standard monitoring.

reason: Network bandwidth consumption is unusually high. This may indicate data exfiltration, a misconfigured service, or a DDoS pattern.
suggested_action: Inspect network flow logs immediately. Rate-limit or block suspicious traffic sources.
security_note: MEDIUM RISK — Resource is publicly exposed to the internet.
